output.summary: Successfully added optional FAQ schema (JSON-LD) functionality to the Accordion block. Added enableFaqSchema boolean attribute, ToggleControl in the editor sidebar, and PHP logic to output FAQPage structured data when enabled.

filesModified.purpose: Added enableFaqSchema boolean attribute with default false
changes: Added enableFaqSchema attribute definition after alwaysOneOpen

filesModified.purpose: Added enableFaqSchema to type definition and toggle control in Behavior panel
changes: Added enableFaqSchema: boolean to AccordionAttributes type
Added ToggleControl for 'Enable FAQ schema (SEO)' in Behavior PanelBody
Toggle includes help text explaining it outputs FAQPage structured data

filesModified.purpose: Added JSON-LD FAQPage schema output logic
changes: Added PHP logic after closing </section> to generate JSON-LD when enableFaqSchema is true
Iterates $block->inner_blocks to extract questions (from title attribute) and answers (from rendered inner blocks)
Uses wp_strip_all_tags() to convert content to plain text
Skips items with empty questions or answers
Outputs <script type="application/ld+json"> with properly formatted FAQPage schema
Uses wp_json_encode() with JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE flags

attributesAdded.name: enableFaqSchema
attributesAdded.purpose: Controls whether FAQPage JSON-LD structured data is output on the frontend

warnings: Existing performance warnings about bundle sizes (not related to changes)
Existing ESLint warnings about experimental APIs in Accordion.tsx (pre-existing, not introduced by changes)

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP are in sync. The enableFaqSchema attribute exists in both TypeScript interface and PHP docblock. The toggle control in TSX is editor-only; the PHP implements the actual JSON-LD output.

newVariation.title: FAQ Schema Enabled
newVariation.description: Accordion with enableFaqSchema=true. Outputs FAQPage JSON-LD structured data for search engines. Check page source to verify <script type="application/ld+json"> output.

implementationNotes.schemaStructure: Follows Google FAQPage schema specification with @context, @type: FAQPage, and mainEntity array of Question objects
implementationNotes.answerExtraction: Renders each accordion-item's inner_blocks and strips HTML tags to get plain text
implementationNotes.validation: Only includes items with non-empty question AND answer after trimming whitespace
implementationNotes.outputLocation: JSON-LD script placed immediately after closing </section> tag
implementationNotes.encoding: Uses wp_json_encode() with JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE for maximum compatibility

output.qaScope: Functional QA should verify: (1) JSON-LD script appears in page source when enableFaqSchema=true, (2) script is absent when enableFaqSchema=false, (3) JSON structure matches Google FAQPage spec, (4) questions and answers are properly extracted and formatted, (5) empty items are excluded from schema
